expectations.evidence: gridColumnSpan={{ mobile: "4", tablet: "4", desktop: "4" }} used throughout

expectations.text: Mobile breakpoint included in responsive gridColumnSpan or columns prop
expectations.evidence: mobile key always included in responsive objects

expectations.text: Gap uses token string values (e.g. "300") not numeric values (e.g. 3)
expectations.evidence: gap={{ mobile: "200", desktop: "300" }} uses string tokens

expectations.text: Gap/spacing set on parent container, not margin on individual cards
expectations.evidence: gap on Grid parent, no margin on individual Card children
